title: SourceSystemReference
description: Architecture contract for a reference to a client source system or source location (an ERP/WMS export, report, telemetry stream, document, etc.) that may become a source input for capsulization. Held in Peak's controlled engagement storage — NOT in this repository, and it references source material without embedding sensitive content. No instances are committed to the repo. See SOURCE_SYSTEM_CAPSULIZATION.md. Capsulization/ingestion is intended future architecture, not implemented.

engagement_id.description: The engagement this source reference belongs to.

location_descriptor.description: Non-sensitive descriptor of where the source lives in controlled storage (a pointer, not the content).

authorization_scope.description: The authorization under which this source was captured and may be used.

sensitivity_class.description: Handling sensitivity of the source material.

evidence_ids.description: EvidenceReference ids derived from or pointing at this source.

access_status.description: Access status for this source system (SourceSystemAccessStatus).
